event: Kannon (Bodhisattva of Compassion) crossing the sea
description: A tall, narrow Japanese scroll painting depicting a serene feminine figure in flowing white robes standing atop ocean waves. The figure wears an ornate golden crown and holds an offering vessel. A large circular halo or moon glows behind the figure's head. The waves below are rendered with dynamic, foaming white lines. The background is a soft pinkish-gray wash. Japanese characters appear at the lower right. The overall effect is ethereal and contemplative.
